stemHtml: Shortly after take-off from Walden as Fastair 789, a passenger feels unwell. You are in Alexander Control's area. What message do you send?

options.a: ALEXANDER CONTROL, FASTAIR 789, A PASSENGER IS FEELING UNWELL, RETURNING TO WALDEN, 20 MILES WEST...
options.b: MEDICAL, FASTAIR 789, A PASSENGER IS FEELING UNWELL, RETURNING TO WALDEN...
options.c: MEDICAL, FASTAIR 789, 20 MILES WEST OF WALDEN, ONE SICK PASSENGER...
options.d: ALEXANDER CONTROL, FASTAIR 789, 20 MILES WEST OF WALDEN, ESTIMATED TIME EN ROUTE 20 MINUTES...
